hero.label: NORAFLIX ORIGINAL
hero.title: Nora: The Birthday Cut
hero.description:
Happy Birthday, Nora bb ❤️

Welcome to your own little corner of the internet. Every memory, every adventure, every laugh, every late-night drive, and every little moment we've shared now has a home here.

So grab some snacks, get comfy, and let's relive our favorite story together.
hero.footerText: Made exclusively for Nora • Since April 2025 ❤️
